# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Workspace Boundary — STRICTLY FRONTEND ONLY

- This workspace is the **frontend only**: `/home/sachin/Documents/METAERP_DEV/fe/`
- The backend is a **completely separate project** at `/home/sachin/Documents/METAERP_DEV/tmpapp/`
- **NEVER** read, edit, create, or run anything inside the backend directory
- **NEVER** access, query, or modify the database in any way
- If a bug is identified in the backend or DB, **report it only** — do not fix it
- **DO EVERYTIME** read BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_STATE.md before starting work to understand the current state of the backend graphql queries and mutations.
